aids.title: Cookie CRA - Create, Read, Abolish
aids.content: **C**reate: new Cookie(name,value) + response.addCookie(). **R**ead: request.getCookies() + loop. **A**bolish: setMaxAge(0) + response.addCookie(). CRA - the cookie lifecycle.

aids.title: MaxAge Values Rule
aids.content: Positive = persists that many seconds. Zero = DELETE now. Negative = session cookie (dies with browser). Think: '+keep, 0=kill, -session'.

aids.title: SH - Cookie Security Flags
aids.content: **S**ecure (HTTPS only) + **H**ttpOnly (no JavaScript access). SH flags protect cookies from network sniffing and XSS attacks.

aids.title: Cookie Limitations - 4-20-S
aids.content: 4KB max per cookie, ~20 cookies per domain, Strings only. 4-20-S - the three main cookie limitations.
